title: About pTrack
mission_body: pTrack helps Kigali citizens track, report, and reduce plastic waste in their neighbourhoods. By combining community reporting with gamified recycling incentives, we aim to make environmental accountability a daily habit — one point at a time.
capstone_body: pTrack was developed as a final-year BSc Software Engineering capstone at the African Leadership University (ALU). It pilots a digital incentive model to drive measurable behavioural change in plastic waste management — grounding the research in the lived reality of Kimironko Sector, Gasabo District, Kigali.
pilot_body: pTrack is currently piloting with residents of Kimironko Sector, Gasabo District. The platform is designed to scale across all of Kigali — and eventually Rwanda — as the programme expands.
